project_type: Next.js 15 full-stack grocery app with new Flutter Web/Mobile frontend being added alongside
build_system: npm for Next.js, flutter CLI for Flutter app. Flutter SDK must be installed first (not pre-installed).
test_framework: tsx --test for Node tests, playwright for UI tests. Flutter uses flutter test.
test_command: cd msm_app && flutter analyze && flutter test
verification_instructions: 1. Run flutter analyze in msm_app/ to check for static errors. 2. Run flutter test to verify unit tests pass. 3. Run flutter build web --release to verify web build succeeds.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Flutter code generation: *.g.dart and *.freezed.dart files generated by build_runner. Command: cd msm_app && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
setup_instructions: 1. Clone Flutter SDK: git clone -b stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git /opt/flutter --depth 1. 2. Add to PATH. 3. Run flutter doctor. 4. cd msm_app && flutter pub get.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access to pub.dev, GitHub, etc. Flutter SDK not pre-installed, must be installed via git clone. Java 25 available for Android toolchain.
contribution_requirements: Existing Next.js app must remain untouched except for: package.json script additions, next.config.ts rewrite rule, new app/api/flutter-auth/route.ts. The Flutter app lives entirely in msm_app/ directory.
key_patterns: Auth uses NextAuth with JWT strategy and phone-OTP credentials provider. API routes at /api/ use session-based auth. OTP flow: POST /api/auth/otp/send (phone) then POST /api/auth/otp/verify is handled via NextAuth signIn('phone-otp'). Orders: GET/POST /api/orders. Products served from static lib/products.ts (no /api/products route currently - products are used client-side).
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js routes (admin, customer, API). components/ - UI components. lib/ - utilities, auth, products. prisma/ - DB schema. public/ - static assets. msm_app/ (to be created) - Flutter project.
